description: Complete the blog posting functionality by adding edit and delete capabilities, displaying timestamps, and adding basic validation

tasks.task: Add UPDATE endpoint for posts: In src/blog/blog.controller.ts, add a @Patch(':id') or @Put(':id') endpoint that accepts { title?: string, body?: string } and calls a new update() method. In src/blog/blog.service.ts, implement the update(id: number, data: { title?: string, body?: string }) method that finds the post by id, updates the fields, and returns the updated post. Throw NotFoundException if post doesn't exist. Follow the existing patterns in blog.controller.ts and blog.service.ts.

Add DELETE endpoint for posts: In src/blog/blog.controller.ts, add a @Delete(':id') endpoint that calls a new delete() method. In src/blog/blog.service.ts, implement the delete(id: number) method that removes the post from the array and returns void or the deleted post. Throw NotFoundException if post doesn't exist. Follow the existing NestJS patterns with @Param('id', ParseIntPipe).

Update Post interface to include createdAt: In src/components/PostList.tsx, update the Post interface to add 'createdAt: string' field. Display the formatted date in the PostList component under each post title. Also update src/components/PostDetail.tsx to show the creation date below the title.

Create EditPost component: Create src/components/EditPost.tsx following the pattern of CreatePost.tsx. It should accept a post prop with existing values, pre-fill the form fields, and make a PATCH request to http://localhost:3000/posts/:id. Include props: post: Post, onPostUpdated: (post: Post) => void, onCancel: () => void. Use the same form styling classes from style.css.
dependencies: Update Post interface to include createdAt

tasks.task: Add Edit and Delete buttons to PostDetail: In src/components/PostDetail.tsx, add an 'Edit' button that triggers editing mode, and a 'Delete' button that shows a confirmation and calls DELETE http://localhost:3000/posts/:id. Update the component props to include onPostDeleted: (id: number) => void and onEditPost: (post: Post) => void callbacks.

Integrate edit/delete flow in App.tsx: Update src/App.tsx to handle the new edit and delete flows. Add state for editingPost, render EditPost component when editing, implement handlePostUpdated to update the posts array, and implement handlePostDeleted to remove the post from the array and return to the list view.
dependencies: Add Edit and Delete buttons to PostDetail

tasks.task: Add CSS styles for edit/delete UI: In src/style.css, add styles for the action buttons in PostDetail (edit-btn, delete-btn classes), confirmation dialog styling if needed, and ensure the buttons are styled consistently with the existing .new-post-btn pattern.

example_backend: GET /posts returns list of posts with createdAt field
GET /posts/:id returns single post with createdAt field
POST /posts creates new post and returns it with id and createdAt
PATCH /posts/:id updates post title and/or body, returns updated post
DELETE /posts/:id removes post and returns success
example_frontend: Post list displays creation date for each post
Post detail view shows creation date
Edit button on post detail opens edit form with pre-filled values
Submitting edit form updates the post and returns to detail view
Cancel on edit form returns to detail view without changes
Delete button shows confirmation before deleting
Confirming delete removes post and returns to list view
Post list reflects changes after edit/delete operations
